name: llm-language
description: Self-evolving prompt meta-compiler targeting Claude Opus 4.7 with xhigh/max effort, adaptive thinking, task budgets, and dual-layer memory (ROSETTA.md + auto-memory). v4.0: Opus 4.7 native, Buffer-of-Thoughts meta-buffer, Meta-Reasoner bandit, guardrails, PreCompact hooks, 10 scoring dimensions, threshold 9.3. Backward-compatible with Opus 4.6/Sonnet 4.6.
